form.formComment: Resuming after a lengthy spell. Having raced just once last preparation made some head-way from midfield; finished fifth of 9 starters at Exeter on October 22 2024 over 4800m, 21 len behind Jupiter Allen carrying 72.5kg at $6. First up last campaign got back early finished fourth in a small field at Huntingdon on November 25 2023 over 4000m, 18 len behind Mylesfromwicklow carrying 76kg at $3.50. Can return in top form.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-15.5). Resuming after a lengthy spell. First up last campaign got back early finished fourth in a small field at Huntingdon on November 25 2023 over 4000m, 18 len behind Mylesfromwicklow carrying 76kg at $3.50. Can return in top form.

form.formComment: Useful type. Comes off a 34 day let-up. Last start finished third in a small field at Wincanton on March 5 over 4000m, 11 len behind Royal Mer with 74.5kg at $4. Race to post a big 8 len win. Southwell on February 2 over 4100m defeating Roger Rarebit with 72kg at $3.50 in a steeplechase. Rates well and can feature in the finish again.

form.formComment: Freshened for 31 days. Last outing finished seventh of 8 runners at Warwick on March 8 over 5800m, 70 len behind House Of Habsburg carrying 71kg at $10. Race before won by 2.25 len Doncaster on February 5 over 4800m slow going defeating Kadjar Des Mottes with 75.5kg at $3.80 in a steeplechase. Finds a very nice assignment and can return to form.

form.formComment: Recent form hard to fault. Last start finished fourth of 8 runners at this track on March 27 over 3900m, 5 len behind Superstylin carrying 67kg at $7.50. The start before that; finished second in a small field at this track on March 14 over 3900m, on slow going 13 len behind Mon Champion with 71kg at $4.60. Cannot be left out in this more suitable contest.

form.formComment: Third-up today and won third-up in the past. First-up pulled up at Kempton Park on February 2 over 4800m. Last start pulled up at Uttoxeter on March 14 over 4000m. Hard to recommend this time.

formComments.title: TAB
